extortion.description: canalcapital.gov.co zoominfo.com/c/canal-capital/459823596 Canal Capital is a media organization based in Bogotá, Colombia, providing a variety of programming that includes documentaries and series focused on social issues, cultural expressions, and community engagement. Their services aim to create transparency and facilitate citizen participation through diverse media content, including programs specifically designed for different age groups and interests. The company primarily targets the local audience in Bogotá, as well as anyone interested in Colombian culture and social matters. Their initiatives also involve collaborations with citizens, promoting awareness on environmental, social, and health issues
